engagement.name: CostSmart IT Optimization
engagement.desired_outcome: Reduce IT operating costs by 20% (€3.2M annually) through infrastructure consolidation, cloud migration, and support model optimization while maintaining BaFin compliance
engagement.scope: Full IT cost base: 3 data centers, 280 servers, 4,200 desktop/laptop endpoints, 45 IT staff, 3 outsourcing contracts
constraints: No headcount reduction (retraining permitted, layoffs not)
Locked vendor contracts until Q3 2027 for 2 of 3 outsourcing agreements
BaFin BAIT/VAIT compliance must be maintained at all times
Core banking system migration off-limits (separate project)

decisions.decision: Frame around optimize-vs-transform tension: cloud optimization delivers quick cost wins, but structural cost problems remain without deeper transformation
decisions.rationale: Client can hit 20% target through cloud alone, but this creates technical debt and doesn't address support model inefficiencies

decisions.decision: Hybrid approach: cloud optimization (quick wins) + data center consolidation (structural) + support model redesign
decisions.rationale: Addresses both immediate savings target and long-term cost structure; retraining instead of headcount reduction
